verse_text: 'Son of man, take up a lamentation for the ruler of Tyre, and say to him, 'Thus says the Lord and Master: 'You are a seal of resemblance and crown of beauty.

pericope.title: Lamentation for the Ruler of Tyre

links.context: Satan was created first among all the angels and was exalted as ruler of creation (see [[EZK.28:12]], [[EZK.28:13]]; Is 14:12).
